title: Stablecoin giving grows as 'crypto philanthropy' matures: Report
message_html: Stablecoin giving grows as 'crypto philanthropy' matures: Report ...
snippet: Fundraising platform Giving Block said it faciliated more than $100 million in donations of stablecoins to charities in 2025, a surge possibly aided by a change in US laws.

title: Sui joins stablecoin race with USDsui mainnet launch
message_html: Sui joins stablecoin race with USDsui mainnet launch ...
snippet: The core developer behind Sui designed the network to outperform other blockchains in terms of speed and scalability.

title: Trump's social media post on crypto bill 'not enough' to move legislation, TD Cowen says
message_html: Trump's social media post on crypto bill 'not enough' to move legislation, TD Cowen says ...
snippet: Trump's direct involvement is required, but it is hard to see that occurring while the U.S. is in armed conflict with Iran, TD said.

title: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter
message_html: Zerohash joins surging list of crypto firms vying for a bank charter ...
snippet: Several crypto companies have secured OCC conditional approval for a banking charter since the GENIUS Act was passed in July, including Circle, Ripple, Bridge and Stripe.
